analysis:
Based on your scan results:

**Best Position Income CC:**
GOOGL - Sell 365 calls, 2026-06-18, 49 DTE, $11.65/$11.90, delta 0.39, 25.1% annualized

**Best LEAPS:**
None qualify - All showing poor timing signals (high IVP + technical concerns). MSFT has attractive pullback but 84% IVP too expensive. Others either overweight, extended, or at technical lows.

**IVP Environment:** Elevated volatility across the board (45-89% IVP) - poor environment for buying LEAPS, decent for selling premium on existing positions.

No qualifying CSPs, standalone CCs, PMCCs, or Bull Call Spreads in current scan.
